completeness.evidence: Includes chart composition (title, axes, legend), main trend phases, peaks/valleys, range, and end direction. It could more explicitly note the mid-2024 plateau and the sharp rebound around mid-2023, but overall covers most key elements.

overall_comment: A generally solid summary with sound structure and useful insights, but accuracy is weakened by several numerical/timing misstatements and a possibly ambiguous interpretation of the exchange rate units.
